# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` first — that is the source of truth for this project.
This file only contains Copilot-specific notes.

## How To Start
Read `AGENTS.md` → section "AUTO-START" → follow state detection logic.

## Copilot-Specific Notes
- Follow coding rules defined in `AGENTS.md`
- Check `docs/knowledge/INDEX.md` for known patterns and pitfalls
- Use conventional commits: `feat/fix/test/chore: [description]`
- Write tests alongside implementation code
